Vicente Fox

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?president WHERE {
  ?president wdt:P35 wd:Q191262 ; wdt:P570 ?electionDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?electionDate) = 2000)
}
```
